hyperedges.label: Three Tailscale sidecars + co-resident HTTP listeners on Cogitator

HTTP API request chain: bearer auth + cache + error envelope
Daily Suggested Workout pipeline
Compliance assessment + aggregation pipeline

Vigil pipeline: parse → baseline → score
Stryd enrichment: download → upload → record
MCP tool registration in createMcpServer

Workout send targets (intervals.icu and Stryd)
Deity invocation fallback chain (API -> static -> plain)
Vigil testing pipeline (parser → metrics → baseline → scorer)
DSW engine selector tests (staleness, terrain, workout, suggest)
Praescriptor output format tests (FORM, intervals.icu, send, prescriptions)
